scripts.build:unsoccer: npm run build --workspace @itch-games/unsoccer-shared && npm run build --workspace @itch-games/unsoccer-server && npm run build --workspace @itch-games/unsoccer-client
scripts.dev:unsoccer: concurrently --kill-others -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run server:unsoccer" "npm run client:unsoccer"
scripts.typecheck:unsoccer: npm run build --workspace @itch-games/unsoccer-shared && npm run typecheck --workspace @itch-games/unsoccer-server && npm run typecheck --workspace @itch-games/unsoccer-client
